sections.title: A: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: What (1) ...... the phrase 'the great British seaside' bring to mind?
Most people, if asked to respond (2) ...... the top of their heads ...
... associate (3) ...... on holiday to places such as Blackpool or Torquay ...
These days, when people are more likely to go abroad to (4) ...... the sights ...
... traditional British seaside towns (5) ...... suffering from an image problem.
Now, finally, some of the resorts (6) ...... decided to bring their images up to date ...
... in the hope that a (7) ...... of direction will bring back the tourists.
... but those that (8) ...... come will find that today's Blackpool differs quite a bit ...
... differs quite a bit (9) ...... the picture postcard past.
Blackpool has to work hard to catch (10) ...... with foreign destinations ...
... but that's precisely what it (11) ...... doing.
It's the first time so much (12) ...... happened to improve the place ...
A massive building project (13) ...... that rainy days are no longer a problem.
And it appears (14) ...... be working.
As the tourists start to make (15) ...... the bright lights of Blackpool once again ...

sections.title: B: Complete the sentences by changing the form of the word in capitals
sections.instructions: Complete the sentences by changing the form of the word in capitals when this is necessary.

items.sentence: I've always wanted to be a travel (PHOTOGRAPH) ...... and take pictures of exotic places.
None of us were sure which (DIRECT) ...... to go in, so we got out the map.
Since I was here five years ago, Delhi has changed so much that it's practically (RECOGNISE) .......
Once we got to the station, I quickly looked through the (TIME) ...... to see when the next train was.
I've got a cousin at university who is studying (TOUR) ...... and hopes to open a hotel.
As we got closer to the Amazonian village, the (INHABIT) ...... came out to meet us.
The (ARRIVE) ...... of Flight 472 from Amsterdam has been delayed by one hour.

sections.title: C: Complete each second sentence using the word given
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words in each gap.

items.sentence:
As soon as we got on the plane, the pilot told us to get off again. **just**
We ...... the plane when the pilot told us to get off again.

We arrived in Budapest two days ago. **for**
We ...... two days.

I visited Paris once before. **second**
This is the ...... Paris.

I find it hard to go at the same speed as my husband on walking holidays. **up**
I find it hard to ...... my husband on walking holidays.

Joan has always been very fond of travelling and has been everywhere. **keen**
Joan has always been very ...... and has been everywhere.

We drove away as fast as we could, ready to begin our adventure. **full**
We drove away ...... ready to begin our adventure.

As the storm started, we went towards the old house. **direction**
As the storm started, we went ...... the old house.

I'm sorry I didn't look at the hotel room before I booked it. **regret**
I ...... the hotel room before I booked it.
Our next door neighbour ...... his car every Sunday.
Last summer, I ...... to the beach almost every day.
'Whose is this plane ticket on the floor?' 'Oh, it ...... to me. Thank you.'
I'm really tired of travelling so much. 'I thought you ...... a bit quiet.'
'You look thoughtful.' 'I ...... about our holiday last year.'
You went to Chile, didn't you? 'No, but I ...... to Peru, which is right next door.'
Three people were captured at the ...... today trying to get into the country.
There's a fantastic ...... from the top of the Empire State Building!
Once we get to the hotel, let's just quickly ...... and then do a bit of sightseeing.
I'm going to ask for directions because I think we've ...... our way.
We usually do go by train, even though the car is a lot quicker.
Passengers requiring a special meal during the flight should inform the airline in .......
